## VennDiagram GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
VennDiagram is a GenePattern module that Displays a Venn diagram

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: feature.list.one, feature.list.two
- Optional: feature.list.three

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>gp-modules.jar org.genepattern.gui.venn.VennDiagram <feature.list.one> <feature.list.two> <feature.list.three>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation
